title: yatsab #3320
definition:
1) to place, set, stand, set or station oneself, present oneself
    1a) (Hithpael) to station oneself, take one's stand, stand, present
        oneself, stand with someone
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Hithpael) to station oneself, take one's stand, stand, present

    NASB:  to set or station oneself, take ones stand
